title: InformationCube Vendor Demo Kits
summary:
Revenue: $350/week rental; target vendors at trade shows.
- **Time to first $**: 4 days (pitch vendors).
- **First action**: Email 20 vendors from Serper list of "trade show vendors" with "free demo kit" offer.
- **Risk**: Vendor budget constraints (mitigated by low-cost $50 trial week).
Next step: Email 20 vendors from Serper list of "trade show vendors" with "free demo kit" offer.
